name: rtp-llm
description: RTP-LLM: Alibaba's high-performance LLM inference engine for diverse applications.
summaryZh: RTP-LLM: Alibaba's high-performance LLM inference engine for diverse applications. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
